caption: The video depicts a medical simulation scenario, likely part of a training exercise labeled "Sim Week." In the scene, two individuals wearing blue gloves and medical attire are closely examining a smartphone screen, which appears to display an image or document relevant to their task. One person is pointing at the screen, possibly discussing or analyzing the content with the other. The setting includes a patient lying on a bed, partially covered with a white sheet, and various medical supplies and equipment are visible on a nearby table, including a bowl, a cup, and some containers. The atmosphere suggests a collaborative effort to diagnose or treat the patient based on the information displayed on the phone. The text "Day 3" indicates that this is part of a multi-day simulation event.
